$description: Component tokens for the Avatar Group component, which displays multiple avatars in an overlapping horizontal stack with an optional count indicator showing additional members. Figma Reference: Node ID 26683-72318

$component.name: Avatar Group
$component.description: A composite component that displays multiple user avatars in a horizontal overlapping stack. Commonly used to show team members, collaborators, or participants in a compact space.
$component.structure: Horizontal layout with avatars overlapping from left to right, with optional '+N' count badge at the end

sizes.xs: 24px avatars - Minimal size for dense layouts
sizes.sm: 32px avatars - Compact size for lists and cards
sizes.md: 40px avatars - Standard size for most use cases
sizes.lg: 48px avatars - Larger for emphasis or section headers

variants.with-count: Shows a count badge (+N) for additional members not displayed
variants.without-count: Shows only the visible avatars without count indicator

usage.contexts: Project collaborators, team members, document viewers, meeting participants, shared access lists
usage.maxVisible: Typically shows 3-5 avatars before using count indicator
usage.overlap: Avatars overlap by a percentage of their width for compact display

container.$comment: Main wrapper container - horizontal flex layout with overlapping avatars

direction.description: Avatar group uses horizontal layout with left-to-right stacking

gap.$comment: Negative margin creates overlap effect - smaller values = more overlap

3xs.description: Overlap amount for 3xs avatars - negative margin for overlap effect

2xs.description: Overlap amount for 2xs avatars - negative margin for overlap effect

xs.description: Overlap amount for xs avatars - negative margin for overlap effect

sm.description: Overlap amount for sm avatars - negative margin for overlap effect

md.description: Overlap amount for md avatars - negative margin for overlap effect

avatar.$comment: Individual avatar styling within the group

3xs.description: Border radius for 3xs avatars - full circle

2xs.description: Border radius for 2xs avatars - full circle

xs.description: Border radius for xs avatars - full circle

sm.description: Border radius for sm avatars - full circle

md.description: Border radius for md avatars - full circle

z-index.$comment: Stacking order - first avatar has highest z-index, decreasing for each subsequent avatar

decrement.description: Amount to decrease z-index for each subsequent avatar

tooltip.$comment: Tooltip configuration for showing member names on hover

enabled.description: Whether to show tooltips on avatar hover

container.description: ARIA role for avatar group container

format.description: Format for ARIA label describing the group
